requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety, EMC, and RCD / Residual-Current Protection
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全、EMC 与 RCD / 剩余电流保护
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全、EMC 與 RCD / 剩餘電流保護

summary.en: EV charging equipment for Thailand should be checked against the applicable IEC / TIS safety and EMC parts, including IEC 61851-series safety functions and off-board charger EMC expectations. Installations may also require residual-current protection, earthing, overcurrent protection, isolation, emergency stop, enclosure, and environmental-rating evidence according to the charger type and site design.
summary.zh: 进入泰国的电动汽车充电设备应核对适用的 IEC / TIS 安全与 EMC 部分，包括 IEC 61851 系列安全功能及非车载充电设备 EMC 预期。安装还可能需要根据充电桩类型和站点设计提供剩余电流保护、接地、过流保护、隔离、急停、外壳和环境等级证据。
summary.zht: 進入泰國的電動汽車充電設備應核對適用的 IEC / TIS 安全與 EMC 部分，包括 IEC 61851 系列安全功能及非車載充電設備 EMC 預期。安裝還可能需要根據充電樁類型和站點設計提供剩餘電流保護、接地、過流保護、隔離、急停、外殼和環境等級證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2:2018 EMC requirements for off-board EV charging systems
Thai electrical installation and utility inspection requirements

summary.en: GB-standard cn_common_equivalent: China commonly uses GB/T 18487 for conductive charging systems and may provide GB/T safety, EMC, leakage-current, insulation, IP, temperature-rise, and protective-function test evidence. That evidence should be mapped clause by clause to Thai IEC / TIS and site requirements.
summary.zh: GB标准中国常见对应：中国通常采用 GB/T 18487 作为传导充电系统标准，并可能提供 GB/T 安全、EMC、漏电流、绝缘、IP、温升和保护功能测试证据。该证据应逐条映射至泰国 IEC / TIS 及站点要求。
summary.zht: GB標準中國常見對應：中國通常採用 GB/T 18487 作為傳導充電系統標準，並可能提供 GB/T 安全、EMC、漏電流、絕緣、IP、溫升和保護功能測試證據。該證據應逐條映射至泰國 IEC / TIS 及站點要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T EMC and electrical safety test evidence

gap.en: Build a safety file covering RCD or RDC-DD strategy, protective earth continuity, insulation monitoring for DC systems, touch-current limits, EMC test reports, surge protection, emergency stop, enclosure IP / IK rating, Thai installation drawings, and retest triggers after connector or grid-interface changes.
gap.zh: 应建立安全资料包，覆盖 RCD 或 RDC-DD 策略、保护接地连续性、直流系统绝缘监测、接触电流限值、EMC 测试报告、浪涌保护、急停、外壳 IP / IK 等级、泰国安装图纸，以及接口或电网侧变更后的复测触发条件。
gap.zht: 應建立安全資料包，覆蓋 RCD 或 RDC-DD 策略、保護接地連續性、直流系統絕緣監測、接觸電流限值、EMC 測試報告、浪湧保護、急停、外殼 IP / IK 等級、泰國安裝圖紙，以及介面或電網側變更後的複測觸發條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where required by TISI compulsory scope, electrical installation rules, utility inspection, procurement specification, or site safety approval
mandatory_status.cn: China GB-standard safety and EMC evidence should be mapped and retested where Thai IEC / TIS or installation requirements differ

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Safety and EMC files should show the Thai installation protection concept, not only a China GB/T test report.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安全和 EMC 文件应体现泰国安装保护方案，而不仅是中国 GB/T 测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安全和 EMC 文件應體現泰國安裝保護方案，而不僅是中國 GB/T 測試報告。
